title: Argentinian Hash with Broccoli and Maltiness
description: A hearty breakfast hash with a touch of Argentina and a hint of malt, served with steamed broccoli.

ingredients.name: broccoli
ingredients.amount: 1 head, trimmed and cut into florets

instructions: In a large skillet, heat the malted ingredient over medium heat.
Add the diced hash and cook until lightly browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the broccoli to the skillet and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Transfer the skillet to the oven and bake for an additional 5-7 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with additional malted ingredients if desired.
